name: Omar Jarbou
title: Computer Engineer
tagline: I build scalable software solutions with real-world impact.
subtitle: Full-Stack Developer · Embedded Systems Experience
about: I'm a computer engineering student focused on software development, building scalable and reliable applications across the full stack. I develop responsive user interfaces, mobile applications, and efficient backend APIs, with strong experience in database integration for real-world systems. In addition to software, I have hands-on experience with embedded systems, working with sensors, microcontrollers, and real-time control in practical projects.

highlights.title: Full-Stack Development
highlights.description: I build complete applications, from responsive frontends to backend APIs and database integration.

highlights.title: Embedded Systems
highlights.description: Hands-on experience with sensors, microcontrollers, and real-time control in practical projects.

highlights.title: Problem Solving & Debugging
highlights.description: Strong ability to analyze issues, debug systems, and find practical solutions.
